mistakeDistribution.description: Arithmetic sign errors and misreading coefficients.
Misapplying the work-energy theorem in non-conservative fields.
Skipping intermediate steps in multi-step integration.

behavioralInsight: Your accuracy drops by 35% on questions attempted after the 90-minute mark, strongly indicating mental fatigue. Furthermore, 50% of your lost marks come from simple sign inversion errors during integration steps.
